parsed_review.summary: CP00-667 is a clean descriptor-only continuation of the RP22 External Integrations I domain model (40 units, RP22.P01.M02.S09–RP22.P01.M04.S06, risk B). Directly verified via Read/Grep/Glob: (1) pack identity and bindings are consistent across manifest, review-baseline, registry.js (EXTERNAL_INTEGRATIONS_I_CP667_PACK_BINDING/REQUIREMENTS), and both contract files (generated_from_pack_id CP00-667, current_pack CP00-667, historical ["CP00-666"], next CP00-668/RP22.P01.M04.S07); (2) deliverable distribution {impl 23, ui 5, fixture 2, test 6, hermes 2, claude 2}=40 and micro-title distribution {12,22,6} match plan baseline, requirements, and the 40 manifest included_units; (3) descriptor-only boundaries hold — every case-set row is descriptor_only:true/runtime_execution:false, no_write_attestation is comprehensive, and runtime_boundary flags (external_api/oauth/sync/message_capture/e_sign/webhook/credential/permission/audit/ui/hermes) are all false; (4) model.test.js meaningfully asserts CP00-667 coverage, descriptor continuation, runtime-closed, serialization-hides-raw-payload, and contract-projection-matches-both-files; (5) authority boundaries intact — Claude read_only:true and promotes_claude_to_final_approval:false / claude_is_final_approval:false, Hermes packets are descriptor-only (hermes_runtime_opened:false, runtime_receipt_emitted:false) used solely for deterministic evidence, not product runtime; (6) no secret/token/PII leak patterns and no real-data values found in source or contracts; (7) both contract files are byte-identical deterministic projections; (8) manifest does not over-claim (production_ready:false, runtime_ready:false, deviation_from_plan:false). The pack-level production_ready flag is correctly pending and is gated by this review. Reported but not re-executed by me (read-only, no Bash): command-evidence.json lists all 22 validation commands at exit 0 (node --check, node --test, closeout-pack[-plan] validators, rp22/weighted/spec/fullplan/global/goal/rp00 validators, git diff --check, npm test, build). CP178+ hardening satisfied: this is the first review (no prior valid/invalid receipts), readiness auth-preflight passed, and this output is schema-valid JSON. No P0/P1/P2/P3 defects. blocks_goal_closeout=false per scope (this CP closeout goal only; pack claims neither runtime nor enterprise trust). Final human approval for enterprise-trust remains outside this read-only receipt.
